pr_text:
## Title: Add critical failure logging to MCE ENB Configuration Update handler

### Summary
The `MCE_send_ENB_CONFIGURATION_UPDATE_FAILURE` function in the M2AP MCE interface management module is a stub that triggers `AssertFatal` when called, indicating an unimplemented critical failure path. However, it lacked any logging statement to help operators and developers diagnose when this failure condition occurs and what context led to it. This made debugging M2AP ENB configuration update failures
